def_before_full: based on general ideas and not on any particular real person, thing or situation ; existing in thought or as an idea but not having a physical reality ; not representing people or things in a realistic way, but expressing the artist’s ideas about them

the act of getting something, especially knowledge, a skill, etc. ; something that somebody buys to add to what they already own, usually something valuable ; a company, piece of land, etc. bought by somebody, especially another company; the act of buying it

a comparison of one thing with another thing that has similar features; a feature that is similar ; the process of comparing one thing with another thing that has similar features in order to explain it

everything that can be seen around an event or scene ; the general conditions in which an event takes place, which sometimes help to explain that event ; a painted piece of cloth that is hung behind the stage in a theatre as part of the scenery

a large round container, usually made of wood or metal, with flat ends and, usually, curved sides ; the contents of or the amount contained in a barrel; a unit of measurement in the oil industry equal to between 120 and 159 litres
loved very much ; loved very much by somebody; very popular with somebody
a US, Australian or New Zealand dollar; a South African rand; an Indian rupee

an official document that may be used to prove that the facts it states are true ; an official document proving that you have completed a course of study or passed an exam; a qualification obtained after a course of study or an exam

the quality of being expressed clearly ; the ability to think about or understand something clearly ; if a picture, substance or sound has clarity, you can see or hear it very clearly, or see through it easily

a building or part of a hospital where people can go for special medical treatment or advice ; a period of time during which doctors give special medical treatment or advice ; a private hospital or one that treats health problems of a particular kind ; a building shared by a group of doctors who work together
logical and well organized; easy to understand and clear ; able to talk and express yourself clearly
the state of being formed of many parts; the state of being difficult to understand ; the features of a problem or situation that are difficult to understand

to admit that something is true, logical, etc. after first denying it or resisting it ; to admit that you have lost a game, an election, etc. ; to give something away, especially unwillingly; to allow somebody to have something

a state of not being certain about what is happening, what you should do, what something means, etc. ; the fact of making a mistake about who somebody is or what something is ; a situation in which you feel embarrassed because you do not understand something and are not sure what to do ; a confused situation in which people do not know what action to take

the part of your mind that tells you whether your actions are right or wrong ; a guilty feeling about something you have done or failed to do ; the fact of behaving in a way that you feel is right even though this may cause problems

a person who writes articles for a magazine, book or website, or who talks on a radio or television programme or at a meeting ; a person or thing that provides money or goods to help pay for or support something ; something that helps to cause something

easily damaged or broken ; not strong and easily becoming ill ; small and having a beautiful shape or appearance ; made or formed in a very careful and detailed way ; showing or needing careful or sensitive treatment ; light and pleasant; not strong

a statement that something is not true or does not exist; the action of denying something ; an act of refusing to allow somebody to have something they have a right to expect ; the act of refusing to accept that something unpleasant or painful is true
the quality of being dense; the degree to which something is dense ; how thick a solid, liquid or gas is, measured by its mass per unit of volume
to say officially that somebody/something has a particular character or name; to describe somebody/something in a particular way ; to choose or name somebody for a particular job or position
a calm and serious manner that deserves respect ; the fact of being given honour and respect by people ; a sense of your own importance and value
an area of knowledge or activity; especially one that somebody is responsible for ; a set of websites on the internet that end with the same group of letters, for example ‘.com’, ‘.org’

the branch of science and technology that studies electric currents in electronic equipment ; the use of electronic technology, especially in developing new equipment ; the electronic circuits and components (= parts) used in electronic equipment

to develop gradually, especially from a simple to a more complicated form; to develop something in this way ; to develop over time, often many generations, into forms that are better adapted to survive changes in their environment
to deliberately not include something in what you are doing or considering ; to prevent somebody/something from entering a place or taking part in something ; to decide that something is not possible
easily broken or damaged ; weak and uncertain; easy to destroy or harm ; not strong and likely to become ill

formal permission given by a company to somebody who wants to sell its goods or services in a particular area; formal permission given by a government to somebody who wants to operate a public service as a business ; a business or service run under franchise
believing that something you want will happen ; showing hope ; making you believe that something you want will happen; bringing hope
to introduce a new law, rule, tax, etc.; to order that a rule, punishment, etc. be used ; to force somebody/something to have to deal with something that is difficult or unpleasant

freedom from political control by other countries ; the time when a country gains freedom from political control by another country ; the freedom to organize your own life, make your own decisions, etc. without needing help from other people

the process that takes place when somebody sees or hears something that causes them to have exciting new ideas or makes them want to create something, especially in art, music or literature ; a person or thing that is the reason why somebody creates or does something ; a person or thing that makes you want to be better, more successful, etc. ; a sudden good idea
very great; very strong ; serious and often involving a lot of action in a short period of time

involving a lot of work or activity done in a short time ; complete and extremely detailed; done with a lot of care ; aimed at producing as much food as possible using as little land or as little money as possible
obtained by using your feelings rather than by considering the facts ; able to understand something by using feelings rather than by considering the facts ; easy to understand and to use

the act of taking part in something or dealing with somebody ; the act of giving a lot of time and attention to something you care about ; a close relationship with somebody, especially a romantic or sexual relationship with somebody that you are not married to
the act of separating somebody/something; the state of being separate ; the state of being alone or lonely
to bend or move from a straight position to a sloping position ; to rest on or against something for support ; to make something rest against something in a sloping position
to continue to exist for longer than expected ; to stay somewhere for longer because you do not want to leave; to spend a long time doing something

to work together in order to achieve a particular aim; to organize a group of people to do this ; to find and start to use something that is needed for a particular purpose ; if a country mobilizes its army, or if a country or army mobilizes, it makes itself ready to fight in a war
very bad or unpleasant ; unkind; unpleasant ; dangerous or serious

the degree to which something is likely to happen ; something that makes it seem impossible to do or achieve something ; the connection between two numbers that shows how much money somebody will receive if they win a bet

a small container made of paper or card in which goods are packed for selling ; a small object wrapped in paper or put into a thick envelope so that it can be sent by mail, carried easily or given as a present ; a closed plastic or paper package that contains a very small amount of liquid or a powder
difficult to deal with or to understand; full of problems; not certain to be successful

the unfair treatment of people who belong to a different race; violent behaviour towards them ; the belief that there are different races of people with different characteristics and abilities, and that some races are better than others; a general belief about a whole group of people based only on their race

a person who fights against the government of their country ; a person who opposes somebody in authority over them within an organization, a political party, etc. ; a person who does not like to obey rules or who does not follow generally accepted standards of behaviour, dress, etc.

the process of changing or improving the condition of something or the way it works; the process of putting something back into the state it was in before ; the activity of building again something that has been damaged or destroyed ; a copy of something that no longer exists ; an act of acting out events that are known to have happened, in order to try and get more information or better understanding about what happened, especially a crime

the parts of something that are left after the other parts have been used, eaten, removed, etc. ; the parts of ancient objects and buildings that have survived and are discovered in the present day ; the body of a dead person or animal

the ability to understand other people’s feelings ; the ability to understand art, music and literature and to express yourself through them ; the fact of being easily offended or upset by something ; the fact of needing to be treated very carefully because it may offend or upset people ; the fact of reacting quickly or more than usual to something
afterwards; later; after something else has happened

to take liquid, air, etc. into your mouth by using the muscles of your lips ; to keep something in your mouth and pull on it with your lips and tongue ; to take liquid, air, etc. out of something ; to pull somebody/something with great force in a particular direction
better in quality than somebody/something else; greater than somebody/something else ; higher in rank, importance or position

a feeling that somebody has done something wrong, illegal or dishonest, even though you have no proof ; a feeling or belief that something is true, even though you have no proof ; the feeling that you cannot trust somebody/something
the act of choosing when something happens; a particular point or period of time when something happens or is planned ; the skill of doing something at exactly the right time
to put your foot down while you are stepping or walking ; to move, push or press something with your feet ; to walk somewhere
having bad luck; caused by bad luck ; if you say that a situation is unfortunate, you wish that it had not happened or that it had been different
being the only one of its kind ; very special or unusual ; belonging to or connected with one particular person, place or thing
criminal activities that involve sex or drugs ; behaviour that is evil or immoral; a quality in somebody’s character that is evil or immoral
behaviour or attitudes that show high moral standards ; a particular good quality or habit ; an attractive or useful quality
to become wider; to make something wider ; to become larger in degree or range; to make something larger in degree or range

to rub something against a surface, in order to remove dirt or liquid from it; to rub a surface with a cloth, etc. in order to clean it ; to remove dirt, liquid, etc. from something by using a cloth, your hand, etc.
the use of something in a way that is wrong or harmful|unfair, cruel or violent treatment of somebody|rude and offensive remarks, usually made when somebody is very angry
to happen faster or earlier; to make something happen faster or earlier|to start to go faster

an offer by a person or a company to pay a particular amount of money for something|an offer to do work or provide a service for a particular price, in competition with other companies, etc.|to offer to pay a particular price for something, especially at an auction

an explosion or a powerful movement of air caused by an explosion|a sudden strong movement of air|a sudden loud noise, especially one made by a musical instrument that you blow, or by a whistle or a car horn
a mixture of different types of the same thing ; a pleasant or useful combination of different things|to mix two or more substances together|to form a mixture with something
a failure to do something that must be done by law|an action that breaks an agreement to behave in a particular way|a break in a relationship between people or countries
an act of running or driving after somebody/something in order to catch them or it|to run, drive, etc. after somebody/something in order to catch them or it|to force somebody/something to run away

an agreement made between two people or groups in which each side gives up some of the things they want so that both sides are happy at the end ; a solution to a problem in which two or more things cannot exist together as they are, in which each thing is reduced or changed slightly so that they can exist together ; the act of reaching a compromise|to give up some of your demands in order to reach an agreement after disagreeing with somebody|to do something that is against your principles or does not reach standards that you have set
permission to do something, especially given by somebody in authority ; agreement about something|to agree to something or give your permission for something
different from something; against something|completely different in nature or direction|the opposite fact, event or situation
made from milk|connected with the production of milk rather than meat|milk, cheese and other milk products

an argument between two people, groups or countries; discussion about a subject on which people disagree|to argue or disagree with someone about something, or to question whether something is true or valid
a jump into deep water with your head first and your arms in front of you|an act of going underwater and swimming there with special equipment|an act of suddenly flying downwards
lack of difficulty|to become less unpleasant, painful or severe; to make something less unpleasant, etc. ; to make something easier

the reflecting of sound off a wall or inside a particular space so that a noise appears to be repeated; a sound that is reflected back in this way|if a sound echoes, it is reflected off a wall, the side of a mountain, etc. so that you can hear it again|to send back and repeat a sound; to be full of a sound

to develop gradually, especially from a simple to a more complicated form; to develop sth in this way | [biology] to develop over time, often many generations, into forms that are better adapted to survive changes in their environment
in addition to an amount that is necessary, usual or legal|more than is necessary, reasonable or acceptable|an amount by which something is larger than something else

an object or a collection of objects put in a public place, for example a museum, so that people can see it|a collection of things, for example works of art, that are shown to the public|to show something in a public place for people to enjoy or to give them information
covering a large area; great in amount|including or dealing with a wide range of information
fairly hard; not easy to press into a different shape|not likely to change|strongly fixed in place
a strong hold of somebody/something or control over somebody/something|a person’s understanding of a subject or of difficult facts|to take a strong hold of somebody/something
an act of holding somebody/something tightly; a particular way of doing this|control or power over somebody/something|an understanding of something
an act of stopping the movement or progress of somebody/something|to stop; to make somebody/something stop

the time of year when the crops are gathered in on a farm, etc.; the act of cutting and gathering crops ; the crops, or the amount of crops, cut and gathered|to cut and gather a crop; to catch a number of animals or fish to eat

coming from a particular place and having lived there for a long time before other people came there; relating to, belonging to or developed by these people|having originally developed in a particular place, rather than having been brought there from somewhere else
that exists but cannot be touched; difficult to describe, understand or measure|that does not exist as a physical thing but is still valuable to a company
connected with the inside part of something|the inside part of something|the central part of a country or continent that is a long way from the coast
used to refer to the second of two things or people mentioned|nearer to the end of a period of time than the beginning|the second of two things or people mentioned

willing to understand and respect other people’s behaviour, opinions, etc., especially when they are different from your own; believing people should be able to choose how they behave|following or supporting political policies that encourage social change and support the sharing of wealth more equally|having or relating to political and social beliefs that support individual freedom and rights, democracy and free enterprise (= businesses competing against each other with little government control)

considered normal because it reflects what is done or accepted by most people|the ideas and opinions that are thought to be normal because they are shared by most people; the people whose ideas and opinions are most accepted
a friend|used as a friendly way of addressing somebody, especially between men|a person you share an activity or accommodation with
to change smoothly from one image to another using computer animation; to make an image change in this way|to change, or make somebody/something change, into something different
near in position; not far away|a short distance from somebody/something; not far away
the fact that something must happen or be done; the need for something|a thing that you must have and cannot manage without

the fact of not giving enough care or attention to something/somebody; the state of not receiving enough care or attention|to fail to take care of somebody/something ; to not give enough attention to something

if you nod, nod your head or your head nods, you move your head up and down to show agreement, understanding, etc. ; to move your head down and up once to say hello or goodbye to somebody or to give them a sign to do something ; to move your head in the direction of somebody/something to show that you are talking about them/it
despite this|although; despite the fact that|without being affected by something; despite something
a strong feeling of shock and anger|an act or event that is violent, cruel or very wrong and that shocks people or makes them very angry|to make somebody very shocked and angry
a shared area of interest, knowledge, responsibility, etc.|the amount by which one thing covers another thing|a period of time in which two events or activities happen together

the act of going to different parts of a building, an area, etc. to make sure that there is no trouble or crime ; a group of soldiers, vehicles, etc. that patrol an area|to go around an area or a building at regular times to check that it is safe and that there is no trouble

a period of time during which somebody stops talking or stops what they are doing|to stop talking or doing something for a short time before continuing|to stop a video, etc. for a short time using the pause button

a number of things that have been placed on top of each other ; a mass of something that is high in the middle and wider at the bottom than at the top ; a lot of something|to put things one on top of another; to form a pile ; to put something on/into something; to load something with something
that can develop into something or be developed in the future|the possibility of something happening or being developed or used ; qualities that exist and can be developed

the attention that is given to somebody/something by newspapers, television, etc.|the business of attracting the attention of the public to something/somebody; the things that are done to attract attention
a hard hit made with the fist (= closed hand)|to hit somebody/something hard with your fist (= closed hand)|to make a hole in something with a punch or some other sharp object

having the belief that some races of people are better than others or having general beliefs about other people based only on their race; showing this through violent or unfair treatment of people of other races|a person who believes that some races of people are better than others or who has general beliefs about other people based only on their race, and may show this in violent or unfair treatment of people of other races

a short surprise attack on an enemy by soldiers, ships or aircraft|a surprise visit by the police looking for criminals or for illegal goods or drugs|an attack on a building, etc. in order to commit a crime

a person who has recently joined an organization, especially the armed forces, police, or a profession|to find new people to join a company, an organization, the armed forces, etc.|to form a new army, team, etc. by persuading new people to join it

change that is made to a social system, an organization, etc. in order to improve or correct it|to improve a system, an organization, a law, etc. by making changes to it|to improve your behaviour; to make somebody do this

a movement away from a place or an enemy because of danger or defeat ; an act of trying to escape from a particular situation to one that you think is safer or more pleasant|to move away from a place or an enemy because you are in danger or because you have been defeated ; to move away or back ; to escape to a place that is quieter or safer
opposite to what has been mentioned|the opposite of what has just been mentioned|the machine in a vehicle used to make it move backwards

the state or process of being destroyed or severely damaged|the parts of a building that remain after it has been destroyed or severely damaged|the fact of having no money, of having lost your job, position, etc.
a feeling of fear, or a situation in which people are anxious or frightened|to frighten somebody ; to become frightened

a mark, a cut or an injury made by scratching somebody’s skin or the surface of something|to rub your skin with your nails, usually because it is itching ; to cut or damage your skin slightly with something sharp ; to damage the surface of something, especially by accident, by making thin shallow marks on it

a thin pointed piece of metal like a nail with a raised spiral line (called a thread) along it and a line or cross cut into its head. Screws are turned and pressed into wood, metal, etc. with a screwdriver in order to fasten two things together.|to fasten one thing to another or make something tight with a screw or screws|to turn something round and round in order to fasten it in place

to close an envelope, etc. by sticking the edges of the opening together|to close a container tightly or fill a small opening, etc., especially so that air, liquid, etc. cannot get in or out|to make something definite, so that it cannot be changed or argued about
a short time; not long|soon
an act or the sound of sighing|to take and then let out a long deep breath that can be heard, to show that you are disappointed, sad, tired, etc.|to say something with a sigh
only; single|belonging to one person or group; not shared

a very fast turning movement ; the way you make a ball turn very fast when you throw it or hit it|to turn round and round quickly; to make something do this ; to turn round quickly once; to make somebody do this

having less power or authority than somebody else in a group or an organization ; less important than something else|a person who has a position with less authority and power than somebody else in an organization|to treat somebody/something as less important than somebody/something else

a person or thing that you use or have instead of the one you normally use or have|a player who replaces another player in a sports game|to take the place of somebody/something else; to use somebody/something instead of somebody/something else
a sudden increase of a strong feeling|a sudden increase in the amount or number of something|a sudden, strong movement forward or upwards
a swinging movement or rhythm|a change from one opinion or situation to another; the amount by which something changes|a seat for swinging on, hung from above on ropes or chains
a device for controlling the flow of water from a pipe into a bath or sink|a light hit with your hand or fingers|to hit something lightly and quickly, often repeatedly or to a rhythm
done completely; with great attention to detail|doing things very carefully and with great attention to detail
very much; completely|completely and with great attention to detail

extreme physical or mental pain, whether deliberately inflicted or experienced as suffering|to hurt somebody physically or mentally in order to punish them or make them tell you something|to make somebody feel extremely unhappy or anxious
a long line or series of marks that is left by somebody/something|a track, sign or smell that is left behind and that can be followed, especially in hunting|a path through the countryside

a piece of equipment for catching animals|a clever plan designed to trick somebody, either by capturing them or by making them do or say something that they did not mean to do or say|to put somebody in a dangerous place that they cannot get out of
the action of turning something with your hand, or of turning a part of your body|an unexpected change or development in a story or situation|a sharp bend in a road or river
to join together with other people in order to do something as a group|to make people or things join together to form a unit; to join together

the act of making a machine, computer system, etc. more powerful and efficient; the more powerful and efficient machine, computer system, etc.|to make a machine, computer system, etc. more powerful and efficient; to start using a new and better version of a machine, system, etc.|to improve the condition of a building, etc. in order to provide a better service
often changing; likely to change|able to be changed|a situation, number or quantity that can vary or be varied
